creator: aline@bsd.com.br
text:
Port emulators/wine is marked as IGNORE="builds, but fails upon startup".

I've just built and installed Windows Firefox 3.0.8 and Flashplayer 10.0.22.87 Actually I'm writing this bug report through Windows Firefox. And with this environment I can run mega sites "flash 10 only" like http://www.coketeens.com.br with no trouble.

wine-1.1.17,1

Fix: 

Just remove IGNORE or we have to check why the port has this flag and define it to only some environment.
How-To-Repeat: not applicable
